group_1.textRight: An online petition...
Ahh! Yachiyo introduced it on TV earlier!
I saw it too!

group_1.textLeft: Yes, and she would like us to spread@the site around more.

group_1.textRight: Then it'd be better if we shared@it through group chat!

group_1.textLeft: That is a great idea! Now then...
"Dear members of our Union,"
"is there anyone available currently"
"who can respond to this chat?"@And...

group_1.narration: """Yeees!"""
Something happening?
I heard the plan commenced without@use of my ability, yes.
Just returned to Kamihama@a short time ago btw.
So if power is needed,@plenty to spare.
All Witches this side are wiped out,@so talk away!
Same over here.
My voice is pitch perfect!@I'll deliver the best support possible!
Over here...there's just one left...@Missed it while fighting the other Witches...
But once I take it out...@I can help...
Sorry... I don't think I can go.
Dad said "strange things@are happening today,@so let's huddle up@and all get some sleep..."
Everyone, thank you so much!@And Riko, please relax and have a good night!
So what I wish to tell you is...@Actually, just now Iroha gave us a request.
On this online petition here...@She wants to spread word of this@"Student Conference for the Future@of Kamihama" everywhere.
Currently, the number of people@accessing it is gradually growing,@so let us use our power and hasten things!

group_1.textLeft: This is the site Yachiyo introduced during the live@broadcast.
I had heard they were going to talk about@Kamihama so I started watching,
but suddenly seeing someone I know@on there gave me a surprise.

group_1.textRight: It sure seemed like a split-second decision~!
And now, Meguru logs into her@social media account straight away
and posts the link!

group_1.textLeft: The net, huh...@Not something I am very good with...

group_1.textRight: Meiyui, you have an account?

group_1.textLeft: Not a personal one, but one for the Blue Seas@Family.

group_1.textRight: We promoted the site with all our accounts, but...

group_1.textLeft: The visitor count hasn't increased much, has it...?

group_1.textRight: In the end we're lacking in name recognition.@It's just normal people promoting it...
So we get weak results...

group_1.textLeft: Plus...there's this reply to Emiri's post...

group_1.textRight: Hm?

group_1.narration: hol up lol, you srsly doing this lmao?@just cut it out lol

group_1.textRight: Ahaha!
A boy from class is sending me troll replies!

group_1.textLeft: He's not helping...?

group_1.textRight: Well, some kids are just like that.@Don't worry, no biggie.
Even if the guys from class laugh at me,@it's still something worth doing.

group_1.textLeft: How admirable your view is!

group_1.narration: Hello＠AsukaTatsuki

group_1.textLeft: Whoops, Maria is sending me a message...

group_1.narration: It's unfortunate, but...@I think we've hit the limit to@gaining popularity on the@petition with what we have.
Maybe we should think of other options.

group_1.textLeft: It's not just us, then. Everyone seems@to be getting the same impression...

group_1.narration: If so, we should turn to Asuka's@schoolmates for aid, yes?
Asuka's school has girls famous@in the entertainment industry@with their own fanbases, yes?
Ask them directly for their support.@By their nature, that is the@purpose of performance arts.

group_1.textLeft: I get it!
Ria-senpai the model and Sayuki-senpai the idol!

group_1.textRight: That's the old-school historical Mizuna Girls'@Academy for you.
They're like, in the group chat too, aren't they?
You'd think they would've replied by now...?

group_1.textLeft: It's possible they may be busy.@Let me give them a call.

group_1.textRight: If that's how it is, I'm on board.@Leave it to me!
I was just in a meeting,
but I'm about to appear in a livestream
with a Dotuber I know from Takarazaki City.
It's a job that my mom got for me, as my manager.
Ah, and the theme is all about the mysterious happenings in Kamihama...
However, I believe we can the opportunity@to promote the petition.

group_1.textLeft: Thank you so much! That's the same@approach Yachiyo used!

group_1.textRight: [chara:301001:effect_emotion_angry_0][se:7219_strain]I-I did not get inspiration from Yachiyo Nanami,
and I am NOT paying homage to Yachiyo Nanami.
This is merely stealing Yachiyo Nanami's success!

group_1.textLeft: It's rare for you to correct yourself like that...
Ria-senpai readily agreed,@so now onto Sayuki-senpai...

group_1.textRight: Understood~! Please leave this to me!

group_1.textLeft: I'm glad...[chara:101301:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:101301:motion_100][chara:101301:cheek_0][chara:101301:face_mtn_ex_011.exp3.json][chara:101301:lipSynch_1]@Thank you so much.

group_1.textRight: Ah, but everything I post on social media
has to be checked by my manager~
So we'll have to wait for permission to post~

group_1.textLeft: You mean you'll be a little late?

group_1.textRight: It'll be fine~
I'm in a video call with her right now, sooo...
Let's get verbal permission right awaaay.

～～～～@...[chara:303301:lipSynch_0][wait:1.0][chara:303301:motion_300][chara:303301:cheek_0][chara:303301:face_mtn_ex_030.exp3.json][chara:303301:effect_shake][chara:303301:eyeClose_1][chara:303301:lipSynch_1]Fugya!

group_1.textLeft: [chara:101301:effect_emotion_surprise_0][se:7226_shock]...?!

group_1.textRight: Sorry about this, Asuka...
I didn't get permission...
